Package Index | Class Index
Summary: Nested Classes | Ctors | Methods | Inherited Methods | [Expand All]
public class

BinderInternal

extends Object
java.lang.Object
   ↳ com.android.internal.os.BinderInternal

Class Overview

Private and debugging Binder APIs.

See also:

  • IBinder

Summary

Nested Classes
interface BinderInternal.BinderProxyCountEventListener Interface for callback invocation when the Binder Proxy limit is reached. 
class BinderInternal.CallSession A session used by BinderInternal.Observer in order to keep track of some data. 
interface BinderInternal.CallStatsObserver Allows to track observe incoming binder call stats. 
interface BinderInternal.Observer Allows to track various steps of an API call. 
interface BinderInternal.WorkSourceProvider Responsible for resolving a work source.

Public Constructors

public BinderInternal ()

Public Methods

public static void addGcWatcher (Runnable watcher)

Parameters
watcher Runnable

public static void binderProxyLimitCallbackFromNative (int uid)

Callback used by native code to trigger a callback in java code. The callback will be triggered when too many binder proxies from a uid hits the allowed limit.

Parameters
uid int: The uid of the bad behaving app sending too many binders

public static void binderProxyWarningCallbackFromNative (int uid)

Callback used by native code to trigger a callback in java code. The callback will be triggered when too many binder proxies from a uid hits the warning limit.

Parameters
uid int: The uid of the bad behaving app sending too many binders

public static void clearBinderProxyCountCallback ()

Clear the Binder Proxy callback

public static void forceGc (String reason)

Parameters
reason String

public static final IBinder getContextObject ()

Return the global "context object" of the system. This is usually an implementation of IServiceManager, which you can use to find other services.

Returns
IBinder

public static long getLastGcTime ()

Return the system time (as reported by ERROR(SystemClock.uptimeMillis()/SystemClock#uptimeMillis SystemClock.uptimeMillis())) that the last garbage collection occurred in this process. This is not for general application use, and the meaning of "when a garbage collection occurred" will change as the garbage collector evolves.

Returns
long Returns the time as per ERROR(SystemClock.uptimeMillis()/SystemClock#uptimeMillis SystemClock.uptimeMillis()) of the last garbage collection.

public static final void joinThreadPool ()

Add the calling thread to the IPC thread pool. This function does not return until the current process is exiting.

public static final int nGetBinderProxyCount (int uid)

Get the current number of Binder Proxies held for an individual uid.

Parameters
uid int: Requested uid for Binder Proxy count
Returns
int int with the number of Binder proxies held for a uid

public static final SparseIntArray nGetBinderProxyPerUidCounts ()

Get the current number of Binder Proxies held for each uid.

Returns
SparseIntArray SparseIntArray mapping uids to the number of Binder Proxies currently held

public static final void nSetBinderProxyCountEnabled (boolean enabled)

Enable/disable Binder Proxy Instance Counting by Uid. While enabled, the set callback will be called if this process holds too many Binder Proxies on behalf of a Uid.

Parameters
enabled boolean: true to enable counting, false to disable

public static final void nSetBinderProxyCountWatermarks (int high, int low, int warning)

Set the Binder Proxy watermarks. Default high watermark = 2500. Default low watermark = 2000

Parameters
high int: The limit at which the BinderProxyListener callback will be called.
low int: The threshold a binder count must drop below before the callback can be called again. (This is to avoid many repeated calls to the callback in a brief period of time)
warning int: The threshold between high and low where if the binder count exceeds that, the warning callback would be triggered.

public static void setBinderProxyCountCallback (BinderInternal.BinderProxyCountEventListener listener, Handler handler)

Set a callback to be triggered when a uid's Binder Proxy limit is reached for this process.

Parameters
listener BinderInternal.BinderProxyCountEventListener: OnLimitReached of listener will be called in the thread provided by handler
handler Handler: must not be null, callback will be posted through the handler;

public static final void setMaxThreads (int numThreads)

Parameters
numThreads int
